flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Prairie View A & M University rose 47% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.8k → $10.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Prairie View A & M University rose 39% between 2021 and 2024 (14.6% → 20.3%).
